stories.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
stories.simple_summary: Rich tech company leaders are jumping back into work because they're worried they'll miss out on making even more money from AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people who own tech company stocks — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: A new Illinois law will prohibit the use of AI in teacher evaluations
stories.simple_summary: Illinois passed a law that says schools cannot use AI computer programs to decide whether teachers are doing a good job.
stories.why_it_matters: If you live in Illinois and have school-age children, this means your child's teachers will be evaluated by humans, not by computers that might make unfair decisions.

stories.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
stories.simple_summary: Uber is working on using AI in its apps and services, including helping with robotaxis and paying drivers with new financial tools.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Uber, you may notice the app getting smarter about pickup times or ride suggestions in the coming months.

stories.title: Hundreds of experts warn the world must prepare now for AI’s impact
stories.simple_summary: Hundreds of AI experts are warning that the world needs to start getting ready now for the big changes AI will bring.
stories.why_it_matters: This is general advice to governments and businesses to prepare — it's worth paying attention to when you hear news about AI regulations in your area.

stories.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
stories.simple_summary: A company that makes AI videos just raised hundreds of millions of dollars and became worth over 2 billion dollars.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
stories.simple_summary: An AI company is raising 75 million dollars from investors at a very high valuation.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft's leader warned companies that they need to be careful about relying too much on AI systems made by big tech companies.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use AI tools in your small business, remember not to depend on them completely — always keep human oversight in the loop.

stories.title: Siri AI is already changing how I use my iPhone
stories.simple_summary: Apple is adding new AI features to iPhones that make Siri smarter and more helpful.
stories.why_it_matters: If you own an iPhone, you may see Siri get better at understanding what you want and doing tasks for you.

stories.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
stories.simple_summary: Apple sued OpenAI, claiming OpenAI employees may have stolen secret information about Apple's products.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly a legal fight between big companies — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Trump Administration Is Snapping Up Stakes in Private Companies. Could A.I. Be Next?
stories.simple_summary: The Trump Administration is buying stakes in private companies and the article raises the question of whether they might invest in AI companies next.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people who care about government policy — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Top House progressive warns Democrats to get serious on AI messaging
stories.simple_summary: A Democratic House member is telling other Democrats they need to do a better job talking about AI issues to voters.
stories.why_it_matters: This is about politics and messaging — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
stories.simple_summary: Sam Altman from OpenAI made a joke that most AI experts already believe — that Elon Musk's idea for space data centers doesn't make financial sense.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to tech enthusiasts following the debate between these company leaders — nothing you need to act on.
